A '''planet''' in the [[Gama system/Legends|Gama system]] was the [[Gama-Senn]] homeworld. Its populace was intimidated into swearing loyalty to the clone [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] after witnessing the [[Galaxy Gun]] in action.

{{Planet-stub}}
